title: Brain Researcher Tool Contract Envelope
description: Schema for a single tool entry under contracts/tools/<name>.json. The aggregate at docs/mcp_tools.schema.json contains an array of these entries.

name.description: The @mcp.tool function name as exposed via the MCP protocol.

stability.description: OSS-facing stability promise. stable = breaking changes require contract_version bump + one-release deprecation window; experimental = no stability promise; deprecated = replaced by another tool (see deprecated_in_favor_of); internal = not exposed via tool_search.

contract_version.description: Date-based contract version (YYYY-MM-DD) read from contracts/VERSION at extraction time.

tier.description: Legacy alias for surface_tier kept for back-compat; new consumers should read surface_tier.

surface_tier.description: Agent-facing complexity tier; orthogonal to stability.

description.description: Short human-readable description from the @mcp.tool docstring.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema for the tool's input arguments.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema for the tool's output dict.

deprecated_in_favor_of.description: If stability=deprecated, the canonical replacement tool name.
